results.title: Microsoft Advertising Updates Import Center, Cross-Account Portfolio Bidding & Bidding Strategy Report
results.description: Microsoft Advertising announced its monthly releases, and they include updates to the import center, cross-account portfolio bidding, bidding strategy reports, and custom column conversion metrics (that one we covered earlier).

results.title: BT is back with cheap mobile plans, but not everyone gets the best prices
results.description: BT Mobile has attractive pricing but it's under lock and key.
